description: Bootstrap standalone workspace-agent-hub repository and publish the current session fabric
Fix smartphone/Tailscale 502 path and migrate manager backend from Claude CLI to Codex GPT-5.4 xhigh with queue continuity validation
Fix workspace-agent-hub smartphone pairing QR disappearing during dogfood
Fix workspace-agent-hub QR still missing after access-code refresh during dogfood
Implement newest-first topic message ordering in workspace-agent-hub Manager detail view
Redesign workspace-agent-hub Manager UX so task state, manager activity, current reading anchor, and explicit task-targeted sending are obvious during real use
Compact workspace-agent-hub Manager current task anchor so it does not duplicate the full task detail card
Replace workspace-agent-hub Manager stable current-task panel with true inline task detail expansion and remove unnecessary always-visible top anchor
Modernize workspace-agent-hub Hub and Manager visual design with a cohesive contemporary design system and verify desktop/mobile UX
Reduce Manager composer explanatory prose and rely more on structural cues
Advance workspace-agent-hub Manager LINE-like conversation layout and compact composer toggle UX
Rename Manager bucket label from AI confirmation wait to user confirmation wait
Stop Manager auto-jumping to the newly sent topic after global send
Fix Manager composer textarea placeholder so line breaks are shown as real new lines instead of literal \\n
Tighten Manager markdown reply spacing so list and paragraph gaps are easier to read
Replace Manager composer image button flow with drag-drop and clipboard image insertion at the text cursor
Render ANSI-colored CLI output cleanly inside Manager Markdown replies instead of showing raw escape sequences
Separate Manager composer drafts from in-flight sent content so send clears immediately into a separate pending/sent area
Clarify Manager queued state as AI の順番待ち and keep it out of the read-first lane
Hide raw Manager thread IDs from AI-facing prompts and replace visible thread IDs with topic titles in the UI
Make Workspace Agent Hub smartphone access work without RDP while the PC is already on by making the always-on launch path phone-ready and verified
Reassess the Manager send-preview pane and remove it if it does not help the primary send flow
Refine Manager topic-entry, navigation, and queue-label UX so the current task list, topic entry, and back flow match human-first use
Remove Hub session/transcript polling and migrate to push/live updates on web app session browser path
Clarify Workspace Agent Hub Tailscale cross-PC access prerequisites and update docs
Remove Workspace Agent Hub server-side reconciliation interval by introducing authoritative session/transcript change events from the session bridge path
Manager composer: remove SEND label, remove Markdown note, and show send target next to or above the send button
Make Manager refresh latest state after screen lock or browser resume
Make Manager review worker results and perform commit/push/release chain when approved
Improve Manager recent-send lane persistence, deletion, collapse, and naming
Remove default always-on Manager GUI how-to copy for self-evident interactions and prepare global rule update
Investigate why current workspace-agent-hub task does not complete and determine a root-cause fix
Add a favicon to the Workspace Agent Hub Manager GUI site
Investigate whether Workspace Agent Hub Manager URL behaves differently with and without trailing slash and fix if needed
Split remaining workspace-agent-hub changes into appropriate commits and push them
Investigate why Manager can still show stale state after browser/tab resume and identify the root cause or instrumentation gap
